response.step_by_step_log: Watched the video and observed Roboco talking from 00:00 to 04:26. At 04:27, a music segment began. On-screen text identified the song as 'いーあるふぁんくらぶ' and the composer as 'みきとP'. Searched for 'いーあるふぁんくらぶ みきとP 日本語 英語 歌詞' to find lyrics. Identified the performers as Roboco and AZKi.
response.global_summary: Roboco introduces her birthday event and new outfit, then performs a cover of 'I-Aru Fanclub' with fellow virtual artist AZKi.

scenes.description: Roboco talks on stage to the audience, introducing her birthday event and new 3D outfit.
Roboco and AZKi perform the song 'I-Aru Fanclub'. The song title and composer are displayed on-screen.
scenes.song_title: いーあるふぁんくらぶ (I-Aru Fanclub)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
神戸中央区元町駅前
今日から僕の行動力は
ファンクラブ会員番号
48番
いい加減君の趣味嗜好を
把握させてくれないか
「なんてね」って 言って
君は少し笑った

ハイハイチャイナ ちょちょ夢心地
いーあるふぁんくらぶ
だんだん君と 同じ言葉が
使えるね うぉあいにー 言えるかな
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In Kobe, Chuo ward, Motomachi station front
Starting today, my drive
Fan club member number
48
Just tell me, can't you let me
understand your tastes and preferences?
"Just kidding," you said
and you smiled a little

Hai hai China, cho cho dream-like
I-aru fan club
Gradually, I can use the same
words as you, Wo ai ni, can I say it?
